G5091.d: to prize, i.e. fix a valuation upon; by implication, to revere

G5514.e: feminine of apparently a primary word;

G5261.d: an underwriting, i.e. copy for imitation (figuratively)
G5261.e: from a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and G1125 (γράφω);

G5097.d: properly, to protect one's honor, i.e. to avenge (inflict a penalty)
G5097.e: from a comparative of G5092 (τιμή) and ouros (a guard);

G5166.e: from a derivative of (to dry) meaning ripe fruit (as if dry);

G5103.e: of Latin origin but uncertain significance;

G5259.d: under, i.e. (with the genitive case) of place (beneath), or with verbs (the agency or means, through); (with the accusative case) of place (whither (underneath) or where (below) or time (when (at))
G5259.k: among, by, from, in, of, under, with

G5282.d: to think under (privately), i.e. to surmise or conjecture

G5033.d: most quickly, i.e. (with G5613 (ὡς) prefixed) as soon as possible
G5033.e: neuter plural of the superlative of G5036 (ταχύς) (as adverb);

G5147.d: akin to , , and the base of G5131 (τράγος), G5134 (τραῦμα)); a rut or worn track

G5093.d: valuable, i.e. (objectively) costly, or (subjectively) honored, esteemed, or (figuratively) beloved
G5093.k: dear, honourable, (more, most) precious, had in reputation

G5023.e: nominative or accusative case neuter plural of G3778 (οὗτος);
G5023.k: + afterward, follow, + hereafter, X him, the same, so, such, that, then, these, they, this, those, thus

G5438.d: a guarding or (concretely, guard), the act, the person; figuratively, the place, the condition, or (specially), the time (as a division of day or night), literally or figuratively

G5506.d: the commander of a thousand soldiers ("chiliarch"; i.e. colonel

G5432.d: to be a watcher in advance, i.e. to mount guard as a sentinel (post spies at gates); figuratively, to hem in, protect
G5432.e: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G3708 (ὁράω);

G5467.d: difficult, i.e. dangerous, or (by implication) furious
G5467.e: perhaps from G5465 (χαλάω) through the idea of reducing the strength;

G5489.d: a sheet ("chart") of writing-material (as to be scribbled over)

G5260.d: to throw in stealthily, i.e. introduce by collusion

G5200.d: wet (as if with rain), i.e. (by implication) sappy (fresh)

G5021.d: to arrange in an orderly manner, i.e. assign or dispose (to a certain position or lot)
G5021.e: a prolonged form of a primary verb (which latter appears only in certain tenses);

G5118.d: apparently from G3588 (ὁ) and G3739 (ὅς)) and G3778 (οὗτος) (including its variations); so vast as this, i.e. such (in quantity, amount, number of space)
G5118.k: as large, so great (long, many, much), these many

G5230.d: beyond the "acme", i.e. figuratively (of a daughter) past the bloom (prime) of youth
G5230.e: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and the base of G188 (ἀκμήν);

G5175.d: Trogyllium, a place in Asia Minor

G5128.d: these (persons, as objective of verb or preposition)
G5128.e: accusative case plural masculine of G3778 (οὗτος);

G5089.e: perhaps akin to the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι), and thus to G4951 (σύρω);

G5359.d: Philadelphia, a place in Asia Minor
G5359.e: from (the same as G5361 (φιλάδελφος)), a king of Pergamos;

G5622.e: from a derivative of the base of G5624 (ὠφέλιμος);

G5448.e: from G5449 (φύσις) in the primary sense of blowing;

G5223.d: existency or proprietorship, i.e. (concretely) property, wealth

G5537.d: to utter an oracle (compare the original sense of G5530 (χράομαι)), i.e. divinely intimate; by implication, (compare the secular sense of G5532 (χρεία)) to constitute a firm for business, i.e. (generally) bear as a title
G5537.k: be called, be admonished (warned) of God, reveal, speak

G5597.d: to triturate, i.e. (by analogy) to rub out (kernels from husks with the fingers or hand)
G5597.e: prolongation from the same base as G5567 (ψάλλω);

G5165.e: neuter of a presumed derivative of uncertain affinity;

G5160.d: nourishment (literally or figuratively); by implication, rations (wages)

G5158.d: a turn, i.e. (by implication) mode or style (especially with preposition or relative prefix as adverb, like); figuratively, deportment or character
G5158.k: (even) as, conversation, (+ like) manner, (+ by any) means, way

G5422.d: to be a mind-misleader, i.e. delude

G5469.d: a curb or head-stall (as curbing the spirit)

G5520.d: to be bilious, i.e. (by implication) irritable (enraged, "choleric")

G5396.d: to be a babbler or trifler, i.e. (by implication) to berate idly or mischievously

G5315.e: a primary verb (used as an alternate of G2068 (ἐσθίω) in certain tenses);

G5586.d: a pebble (as worn smooth by handling), i.e. (by implication, of use as a counter or ballot) a verdict (of acquittal) or ticket (of admission); a vote

G5603.d: a chant or "ode" (the general term for any words sung; while G5215 (ὕμνος) denotes especially a religious metrical composition, and G5568 (ψαλμός) still more specially, a Hebrew cantillation)

G5007.d: equivalent to G5342 (φέρω)); a balance (as supporting weights), i.e. (by implication) a certain weight (and thence a coin or rather sum of money) or "talent"
G5007.e: neuter of a presumed derivative of the original form of (to bear;

G5611.d: belonging to the right hour or season (timely), i.e. (by implication) flourishing (beauteous (figuratively))

G5545.d: an unguent or smearing, i.e. (figuratively) the special endowment ("chrism") of the Holy Spirit

G5606.d: the shoulder (as that on which burdens are borne)
G5606.e: perhaps from the alternate of G5342 (φέρω);

G5409.d: to have a burden, i.e. (by analogy) to wear as clothing or a constant accompaniment

G5452.d: to set out in the earth, i.e. implant; figuratively, to instil doctrine

G5576.d: to be an untrue testifier, i.e. offer falsehood in evidence

G5095.d: dear to God; Timotheus, a Christian

G5034.d: a brief space (of time), i.e. (with G1722 (ἐν) prefixed) in haste

G5563.d: to place room between, i.e. part; reflexively, to go away

G5585.d: to use pebbles in enumeration, i.e. (generally) to compute

G5112.d: more daringly, i.e. with greater confidence than otherwise
G5112.e: neuter of the compound of a derivative of the base of 5111 (as adverb);

G5479.k: gladness, X greatly, (X be exceeding) joy(-ful, -fully, -fulness, -ous)

G5616.k: about, as (it had been, it were), like (as)

G5025.d: (to or with or by, etc.) these
G5025.e: dative case and accusative case feminine plural respectively of G3778 (οὗτος);

G5072.e: neuter of a compound of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G3376 (μήν);

G5008.d: the fresh, i.e. young girl; talitha (O maiden)

G5137.e: probably from G5143 (τρέχω) (through the idea of mobility);

G5052.d: to be a bearer to completion (maturity), i.e. to ripen fruit (figuratively)
G5052.e: from a compound of G5056 (τέλος) and G5342 (φέρω);

G5412.d: to load up (properly, as a vessel or animal), i.e. (figuratively) to overburden with ceremony (or spiritual anxiety)

G5353.d: utterance, i.e. a musical note (vocal or instrumental)

G5070.e: from the multiplicative adverb of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G5507 (χίλιοι);
